field_changes.new:
* Introducing Caliber's MCP server, with support for both ChatGPT and Claude! This can now be set up in Menu > Connected Apps
* Added a variety of Hyrox-focused exercises, including: Hand-Over-Hand Sled Pull, Lateral Sled Drag, Wall Ball, Double Kettlebell Gorilla Row, Sandbag Bear Hug Carry, Sandbag Shoulder Carry, Burpee Broad Jumps, Tibialis Raises, and more!
